pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: I just finished cleaning up the previous session.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Means I found tickets in places tickets should fear.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Machines are supposed to take quarters and make noise.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: These take memories and make paperwork.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Pixel Haven used to have more staff.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Then the schedule started looking like a ransom note.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: The one who ran the place built half these cabinets by hand.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Paid the light bill late so the games could stay a quarter cheaper.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Old staff. Old machines. Same floor stains.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Somehow I am still the one with a mop.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Some names you do not say until the person is ready to hear them.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Mira is at the counter if you need actual direction.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Once machines start correcting memories, they get picky.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Truth Filter is in Cabinet Row.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Mr. Byte is the one acting like he grades homework.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Mr. Byte can sort the lying cabinets.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Do not argue with a machine that owns red pens.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Let Mr. Byte tell you which memory is being dramatic.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Then come back before the door learns sarcasm.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Vendo has a machine for that, because of course he does.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Try not to let him sell you confidence in a can.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Your signal is leaking all over the place.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Vendo calls that a beverage-adjacent routing issue.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: I call it a mop problem.

lost_shift_file_phase.speaker: Gus
lost_shift_file_phase.text: I saw the Staff Door report two signals after closing.

lost_shift_file_phase.speaker: Gus
lost_shift_file_phase.text: I pretended that was routine work.

lost_shift_file_phase.speaker: Gus
lost_shift_file_phase.text: Routine work is easier to carry than fear.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: You read the file. I can tell.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: You have got the face people get after reading their own name somewhere they did not expect.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Player
static_service_run_intro.text: I did not see a name.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: No. But you looked for one.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: The old late-shift used to make sure I clocked out before they did. Never the other way.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: The file gives me enough to work with.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: But the service route is dead.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: Bring the system back before I ask the door anything important.

static_service_run_anecdote.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_anecdote.text: Now the building has opinions and electricity.

static_service_run_anecdote.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_anecdote.text: That is usually how repair bills become personal.

maintenance_sync_intro.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_intro.text: Two signals are fighting in the door.

maintenance_sync_intro.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_intro.text: Then maybe it opens instead of judging us.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: I do not like doors that listen.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: Part of you matched something it lost.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: Yours, and the one you forgot making.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: Whoever ran this place carried it on a back that was already tired.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: I am calling that fixed because I want lunch.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: I recognized pieces of the old you.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: The way you checked exits before yourself.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: Did not know how to say that without making it worse.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: So I called it maintenance and kept moving.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: Still are, in the ways that matter.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: You always said routine was easier to carry than fear.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: Whole time you were the most scared one here, still sweeping up.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: I do not want to clean around another absence.
